label: Ritual outcome comp (building of def used)
description: Applies qualityOffset when the specified building was used during the ritual (present in usedThings).

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when the specified building was used.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

def.label: Def
def.description: ThingDef of the building that must have been used during the ritual.

maxHorDistFromTarget.label: Max horizontal distance from target
maxHorDistFromTarget.description: Maximum horizontal distance from the ritual target cell that the building must be within to count. 0 means any distance.
